name: Nicolas Vidal
innate: is a Swiss master's student in mechanical engineering at EPFL, known for his methodical approach and quiet confidence. Growing up in Geneva, he developed a keen eye for detail and a pragmatic outlook. He speaks sparingly but with precision, often cutting through noise with logical deductions. While not overtly suspicious, he trusts data over words and will double-check facts before forming conclusions. His calm demeanor masks a quick intellect, and he prefers to observe rather than dominate discussions. In tense situations, he relies on reason rather than emotion, making him a steady but sometimes distant presence.
group_context: EPFL master's students from various majors
